executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to missing or inaccessible GitHub Actions workflow file. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404, indicating that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository or the GitHub token lacks necessary permissions to access it.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the workflow file does not exist at the expected path (.github/workflows/build.yml) in the repository, or the authentication token lacks the required permissions to access it.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.location: Repository: loginkarun/scib_demo, Branch: main, Expected Path: .github/workflows/build.yml
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository at the specified branch, or the GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) used for authentication does not have the 'workflow' scope enabled, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No automated builds can be triggered until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation, preventing code validation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Missing Action URL for Build Tracking
errors.description: The build failure logs contain an empty action_url field, preventing detailed log analysis and build tracking. This occurs because the workflow dispatch failed before a workflow run could be created.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty in build_failure_attempt-3.json. No GitHub Actions run was created due to workflow dispatch failure.
errors.root_cause: Since the workflow dispatch API call failed with HTTP 404, no workflow run was initiated, and therefore no action URL was generated. This is a cascading effect of ERR-001.
errors.impact: Unable to retrieve detailed build logs from GitHub Actions API. Build diagnostics and error analysis are limited to the workflow dispatch error only. Prevents automated log parsing and error classification for actual build failures.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in the repository with proper Maven build configuration.
steps: 2. Create build.yml file with Maven build steps
4. Add Java setup and Maven build commands
5. Commit and push to main branch
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Ensure workflow file follows organization's CI/CD standards and security policies. Review required approvals for workflow changes.

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub Personal Access Token has the 'workflow' scope enabled to dispatch workflow events.
steps: 1. Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
2. Locate the token used for automation (token redacted for security)
4. If not enabled, regenerate token with workflow scope
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Token regeneration requires security team approval. Document token scope changes in audit log.

recommended_fixes.description: Confirm that GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository.
steps: 1. Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
2. Verify 'Actions permissions' is not set to 'Disable actions'
3. If disabled, enable 'Allow all actions and reusable workflows'
recommended_fixes.compliance_notes: Enabling Actions may require repository admin or organization owner permissions.

audit_log.analysis_method: Automated log parsing and error classification
audit_log.notes: Configuration error detected before Maven build execution. No actual build logs available for analysis. Error classification based on GitHub Actions API response.
